_comment: PR crisis tuning + copy. WS-P owns this file. A tos_break spawns one crisis (if none active). Effects are ON TOP of the break's baseline penalties. R register.

options.label: Spin it
options.desc: Pay the PR ghouls to reframe it as 'a raw, unfiltered moment'. Costs ${cost}; claws back most of the reputation.
options.resolveMessage: 🌀 PR statement out: 'context matters'. It cost you ${cost} and a piece of your soul, but the number recovered.

options.label: Bury it
options.desc: Nuke the clips, memory-hole the VOD, seed a distraction. Engagement recovers — regulators and journalists notice the shovel.
options.resolveMessage: 🕳️ Scrubbed. The clip is gone everywhere except the three places that matter. Investigation smells fresh dirt.

options.label: Sacrifice the streamer
options.desc: Full public execution: permaban statement, 'we are shocked', the works. The platform walks away clean. They never forgive you.
options.resolveMessage: 🪓 Statement posted: 'This individual does not represent our community.' You built the community. They were the community.

ignore.label: (say nothing)
ignore.resolveMessage: 🦗 You said nothing. The clip spoke for itself, in every language, on every platform.
